# GitHub Repository Metadata

Use this when creating or editing the repo on GitHub.

## Description

> omo for Claude Code — native Claude Code plugin marketplace (Sisyphus Labs / omo): rules, comment-checker, LSP, ultrawork, ultragoal, start-work continuation, telemetry + bundled ast-grep & LSP MCP servers.

## Topics / Tags

```
claude-code
claude-code-plugin
omo
mcp
lsp
ast-grep
skills
subagents
hooks
```

## Identity

- **Marketplace name**: `sisyphuslabs`
- **Plugin name**: `omo` (installed as `omo@sisyphuslabs`)
- **Repository / install alias**: `lazyclaudecode`

## Settings

- **Default branch**: main
- **Visibility**: public
- **Publish path**: OFF by default (no `LAZYCLAUDECODE_SYNC_TOKEN` configured)
